generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for 360-degree environmental scanning"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudsTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i Depth Camera for RGB-D imaging"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor measuring current velocity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring current steering wheel position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudsTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance SpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance ObjectTrackingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity component for object tracking processing"
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator for vehicle steering control"
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Density-Based Spatial Clustering of Applications with Noise algorithm for point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking and state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python3_8
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control model per ISO 15622"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for embedded computing on Jetson devices"
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationService, VisualizationService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance Python3_8 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 scripting for data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance real-time components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for persistent data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables SQLDataStorageService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC system execution environment on Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display, saving, and reporting of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateMonitoringInsight
]

instance ACCComputationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading for ACC system execution"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksVisualization, ProjectedDrivingPathInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated report generation for system performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportGenerationAction
]

instance SQLDataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "SQL database storage for object tracks and vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageAction
]

instance VehicleStateMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of vehicle speed and steering angle for driver awareness"
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic speed and distance control based on ACC model"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of ACC parameters via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of detected object tracks"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path based on ACC and sensor data"
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of system performance reports"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataStorageAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Persistent storage of vehicle state and object tracks data in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LiDARPointCloudsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudsTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "RGB-D depth camera data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance SpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked object data from Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ClusteredPointCloudsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustered LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudsTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python3_8
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "ACC control commands (desired speed), emergency braking commands, and enable/disable commands for ACC sent from the Digital Twin Entity to the vehicle's motor and steering actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Network latency ≤100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity, with clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture comprising Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, data storage), User Entity (3D visualization and control panel), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), with ROS2 for intra-entity communication and Wi-Fi for inter-entity data exchange."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (development and validation of ACC system) and operational phase (real-time monitoring, optimization, and health monitoring during vehicle operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implementation adheres to ISO 15622 standards; latency and clock sync requirements follow 3GPP 22.185; no explicit verification/validation methods beyond standards compliance."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-component communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE handles serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted Jetson devices; Digital Twin Entity (ACC, data storage) hosted on cloud/server; User Entity on separate device (PC or cloud)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture, ISO 15622 for ACC functionality, and 3GPP Technical Specification 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations include adherence to 100 ms latency and clock synchronization for real-time emergency braking; cybersecurity aspects not detailed in the document."
]
